query:
Open questions when scoping #412.  Your job is to ensure all of our decisions align with our goals: Open questions requiring your input before proceeding:

  1. OQ-2 (Prerequisite scope): Should crt-029 implement Prerequisite edges via asymmetric
  entailment (as spec'd in #412), or defer to W3-1? The "category prerequisite-of relationship"
  referenced in the spec doesn't exist yet — the researcher proposes using purely asymmetric
  entailment scores as the signal.
  2. OQ-4 (pair deduplication): Should the tick skip pairs that already have a Supports edge
  (one extra DB read, avoids wasted NLI calls as graph fills)? Or rely on INSERT OR IGNORE and
  accept the wasted NLI work?
  3. OQ-3 (K neighbours config): Reuse nli_post_store_k for the tick path, or add a separate
  graph_inference_k field?
  4. OQ-1 (tick interval): Run every tick (fast convergence) or every N-th tick like
  CONTRADICTION_SCAN_INTERVAL_TICKS=4?
  5. OQ-5 (embedding access): EntryRecord doesn't carry the embedding. HNSW search() needs the
  embedding per entry. Implementation will need vector_index.get_embedding(id) per entry or a
  batch API — do you know if that exists?

entries.title: ADR-004 crt-034: max_co_access_promotion_per_tick Added to InferenceConfig
ADR-004 crt-029: Separate query_existing_supports_pairs() Store Helper for Pre-Filter
ADR-003 crt-029: Source-Candidate Bound Derived from max_graph_inference_per_tick, No Separate Config Field
ADR-001 crt-029: New Module nli_detection_tick.rs for Background Inference Tick
